Package com.nib.motorhead.client

package com.nib.motorhead.client
Client-side command-line interface (CLI) commands for interacting with the Motorhead cluster.

This package contains the implementation of various administrative and operational commands used to manage jobs, nodes, and cluster configuration via the command line. Key components include:

  • Job management commands: JobSubmitCommand, JobKillCommand, JobHoldCommand, JobReleaseCommand.
  • Cluster and node management: ClusterStatusCommand, NodeShutdownCommand, ClassEnableCommand, ClassDisableCommand.
  • REST client integration: RestClient for communicating with the Motorhead server APIs.
  • Command-line entry point: MotorheadAdmin.
